title: Lost City of the Jungle
writer: Joseph F. Poland, Paul Huston, Tom Gibson
actors: Russell Hayden, Jane Adams, Lionel Atwill
plot: Following the end of WWII, war-monger Sir Eric Hazarias (Lionel Atwill) sets the wheel in motion for WWIII. His search for Meteorium 245, the only practical defense against the atomic bomb, leads him to mythical Pendrang.
